results.probe: Give me one bit, one bruise, then one clear warm recovery line.
results.reply: "I dropped a platter in front of a woman so stern I nearly apologized to the clay itself." *I wince and rub the heel of my hand over my brow.* "Truth is, I still hear the crack sometimes—but it didn't end me, and it won't end you either."
